title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Claude Code and Codex across five categories: user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost and speed. He argues that the Claude Code vs Codex framing is the wrong question and contends that what actually matters is focusing energy on a common underlying principle rather than tool selection alone.
